connectorUiConfig.title: Bitsight Risk Findings (CCF)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: Ingests Bitsight Security Ratings risk-vector findings for a portfolio company into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework. Migrated from the Bitsight Risk Vector Azure Function solution.

sampleQueries.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid
| where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad')
| order by TimeGenerated desc

sampleQueries.description: Findings by risk vector and state
sampleQueries.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize Findings=count() by normalized_risk_state, risk_vector_label

dataTypes.name: BitsightRiskFindings_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Bitsight API token
customs.description: A Bitsight API token with access to the target portfolio company is required. Generate it from Account > API Tokens in the Bitsight console.

customs.name: Company GUID
customs.description: The Bitsight company GUID whose findings will be ingested. One connection ingests one company.

instructionSteps.title: Connect BitSight Risk Findings to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: Provide the BitSight company GUID and API token, then select Connect. One connection ingests findings for one company.

dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| extend _d = details
| extend raw = pack('temporary_id', temporary_id, 'risk_vector', risk_vector, 'risk_category', risk_category, 'risk_vector_label', risk_vector_label, 'grade', grade, 'severity', severity, 'severity_category', severity_category, 'affects_rating', affects_rating, 'first_seen', first_seen, 'last_seen', last_seen, 'duration', duration, 'evidence_key', evidence_key, 'rolledup_observation_id', rolledup_observation_id, 'impacts_risk_vector_details', impacts_risk_vector_details, 'remaining_decay', remaining_decay, 'remediated', remediated, 'comments', comments, 'assets', assets, 'tags', tags, 'details', details)
| extend rv = tolower(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.risk_vector)), tostring(_d.risk_vector), tostring(risk_vector)))
| extend gr = tolower(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.grade)), tostring(_d.grade), tostring(grade)))
| extend sev = iif(isnotnull(_d.severity), toreal(_d.severity), toreal(severity))
| extend sevcat = tolower(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.severity_category)), tostring(_d.severity_category), tostring(severity_category)))
| extend normalized_risk_state = case(gr in ('good','fair','warn','bad','neutral'), gr, sevcat in ('severe','material'), 'bad', sevcat == 'moderate', 'warn', sevcat == 'minor', 'fair', sev >= 7.0, 'bad', sev >= 4.0, 'warn', sev >= 1.0, 'fair', 'unknown')
| where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad')
| where rv in ('botnet_infections','spam_propagation','malware_servers','unsolicited_comm','potentially_exploited','ssl_certificates','patching_cadence','mobile_software','open_ports','file_sharing')
| extend _cguid = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.company_guid)), tostring(_d.company_guid), '')
| extend _evid = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.rolledup_observation_id)), tostring(_d.rolledup_observation_id), iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.evidence_key)), tostring(_d.evidence_key), iif(isnotempty(tostring(temporary_id)), tostring(temporary_id), hash_sha256(tostring(raw)))))
| project
    TimeGenerated = now(),
    company_guid = _cguid,
    company_name = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.company_name)), tostring(_d.company_name), ''),
    finding_uid = strcat(_cguid, ':', rv, ':', _evid),
    temporary_id = tostring(temporary_id),
    risk_category = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.risk_category)), tostring(_d.risk_category), tostring(risk_category)),
    risk_vector = rv,
    risk_vector_label = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.risk_vector_label)), tostring(_d.risk_vector_label), tostring(risk_vector_label)),
    finding_grade = gr,
    severity = sev,
    severity_category = sevcat,
    normalized_risk_state,
    affects_rating = tobool(affects_rating),
    first_seen = todatetime(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.first_seen)), tostring(_d.first_seen), tostring(first_seen))),
    last_seen = todatetime(iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.last_seen)), tostring(_d.last_seen), tostring(last_seen))),
    duration = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.duration)), tostring(_d.duration), tostring(duration)),
    evidence_key = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.evidence_key)), tostring(_d.evidence_key), tostring(evidence_key)),
    rolledup_observation_id = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.rolledup_observation_id)), tostring(_d.rolledup_observation_id), tostring(rolledup_observation_id)),
    impacts_risk_vector_details = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.impacts_risk_vector_details)), tostring(_d.impacts_risk_vector_details), tostring(impacts_risk_vector_details)),
    remaining_decay = iif(isnotnull(_d.remaining_decay), toreal(_d.remaining_decay), toreal(remaining_decay)),
    remediated = iif(isnotnull(_d.remediated), tobool(_d.remediated), tobool(remediated)),
    comments = iif(isnotempty(tostring(_d.comments)), tostring(_d.comments), tostring(comments)),
    assets = assets,
    tags = iif(isnotnull(_d.tags), _d.tags, tags),
    details = _d,
    raw = raw

connectorUiConfig.title: Bitsight Risk Findings (CCF)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: Ingests Bitsight Security Ratings risk-vector findings for a portfolio company into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework. Migrated from the Bitsight Risk Vector Azure Function solution.

sampleQueries.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid
| where normalized_risk_state in ('warn','bad')
| order by TimeGenerated desc

sampleQueries.description: Findings by risk vector and state
sampleQueries.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize Findings=count() by normalized_risk_state, risk_vector_label

dataTypes.name: BitsightRiskFindings_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Bitsight API token
customs.description: A Bitsight API token with access to the target portfolio company is required. Generate it from Account > API Tokens in the Bitsight console.

customs.name: Company GUID
customs.description: The Bitsight company GUID whose findings will be ingested. One connection ingests one company.

instructionSteps.title: Connect BitSight Risk Findings to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: Provide the BitSight company GUID and API token, then select Connect. One connection ingests findings for one company.

properties.displayName: Latest WARN and BAD BitSight findings
properties.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| where normalized_risk_state in ("warn", "bad")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid
| extend CloudApplicationName = tostring(company_name),
    CloudApplicationId = tostring(company_guid)
| project TimeGenerated, company_name, company_guid, risk_vector_label, normalized_risk_state, severity, severity_category, first_seen, last_seen, finding_uid, CloudApplicationName, CloudApplicationId
| order by TimeGenerated desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Returns the most recent WARN and BAD BitSight findings across all monitored companies.

properties.description: BitSight Risk Findings CCF Hunting Query 1

properties.displayName: Latest WARN and BAD BitSight findings
Active BAD BitSight findings by company
properties.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid
| where normalized_risk_state == "bad"
| summarize BadFindings=count(), RiskVectors=make_set(risk_vector_label, 20) by company_name, company_guid
| extend CloudApplicationName = tostring(company_name),
    CloudApplicationId = tostring(company_guid)
| order by BadFindings desc

tags.name: description
tags.value:
Finds the latest active BAD BitSight findings summarized by company to
help analysts identify organizations with the highest concentration of
active risk findings.

properties.description: BitSight Risk Findings CCF Hunting Query 2

properties.displayName: Active BAD BitSight findings by company
BitSight finding trend by risk vector
properties.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| where normalized_risk_state in ("warn", "bad")
| summarize Findings=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), company_name, company_guid, risk_vector_label, normalized_risk_state
| extend CloudApplicationName = tostring(company_name),
    CloudApplicationId = tostring(company_guid)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Trends WARN and BAD BitSight findings by company and risk vector over time.

properties.description: BitSight Risk Findings CCF Hunting Query 3

properties.displayName: BitSight finding trend by risk vector
Newly observed BAD BitSight findings in the last 24 hours
properties.query:
let DetectionWindow = 24h;
let HistoricalFindings =
    BitsightRiskFindings_CL
    | where TimeGenerated < ago(DetectionWindow)
    | summarize by finding_uid;
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(DetectionWindow)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid
| where normalized_risk_state == "bad"
| join kind=leftanti HistoricalFindings on finding_uid
| extend CloudApplicationName = tostring(company_name),
    CloudApplicationId = tostring(company_guid)
| project TimeGenerated, company_name, company_guid, risk_vector_label, severity, severity_category, first_seen, last_seen, comments, finding_uid, CloudApplicationName, CloudApplicationId
| order by TimeGenerated desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Returns BAD BitSight findings first seen in Microsoft Sentinel during the last 24 hours.

properties.description: BitSight Risk Findings CCF Hunting Query 4

properties.displayName: Newly observed BAD BitSight findings in the last 24 hours

properties.description: CompanyRiskPostureSummary_HuntingQueries Hunting Query with template version 3.0.0

properties.displayName: Company risk posture summary from BitSight findings
properties.query:
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid
| where normalized_risk_state in ("warn", "bad")
| summarize Findings=count() by company_name, company_guid, risk_vector_label, normalized_risk_state
| extend CloudApplicationName = tostring(company_name),
    CloudApplicationId = tostring(company_guid)
| order by company_name asc, Findings desc

tags.name: description
tags.value: Summarizes WARN and BAD findings per company and risk vector to support triage.

properties.description: BitSight Risk Findings CCF Hunting Query 5

properties.displayName: Company risk posture summary from BitSight findings

properties.description: NewBadBitSightRiskFinding_AnalyticalRules Analytics Rule with template version 3.0.0

Identifies newly observed BAD BitSight risk findings for the monitored reduced-scope
risk vectors. The rule searches for BAD findings ingested in the last hour that were
not previously observed in the prior 14 days.
properties.displayName: New BAD BitSight risk findings observed
properties.query:
let DetectionWindow = 1h;
let HistoricalWindow = 14d;
let HistoricalFindings =
    BitsightRiskFindings_CL
    | where TimeGenerated between (ago(HistoricalWindow) .. ago(DetectionWindow))
    | summarize by finding_uid;
BitsightRiskFindings_CL
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(DetectionWindow)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by finding_uid
| where normalized_risk_state == "bad"
| join kind=leftanti HistoricalFindings on finding_uid
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    CompanyName = tostring(company_name),
    CompanyGuid = tostring(company_guid),
    RiskVector = tostring(risk_vector),
    RiskVectorLabel = tostring(risk_vector_label),
    FindingUid = tostring(finding_uid),
    Severity = tostring(severity),
    SeverityCategory = tostring(severity_category),
    FirstSeen = first_seen,
    LastSeen = last_seen,
    Comments = tostring(comments)
| extend CloudApplicationName = CompanyName,
    CloudApplicationId = CompanyGuid

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: A new BAD BitSight finding was observed for {{CompanyName}} in risk vector {{RiskVectorLabel}}. Finding UID: {{FindingUid}}.

properties.description: BitSight Risk Findings CCF Analytics Rule 1

properties.displayName: New BAD BitSight risk findings observed

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

The BitSight Risk Findings CCF solution ingests normalized WARN and BAD BitSight risk-vector findings for a selected portfolio company into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework (RestApiPoller). It includes hunting queries and an analytic rule for monitoring the selected BitSight risk vectors.

Data Connectors: 1, Analytic Rules: 1, Hunting Queries: 5

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
